title: Crossing Bridges
overview: After losing his job in Mumbai, Tashi is compelled to return to his village in the remote interiors of Arunachal Pradesh. Waiting for news of any new job in the city, he struggles to get accustomed to life in his native place.

trailers.title: CROSSING BRIDGES | Official Trailer | In cinemas August 29
